arts.ttl: Chelsea £30m transfer option emerges amid 'complicated' Marcus Rashford talks
arts.sum: Premier League clubs cannot loan multiple players to another top-flight team simultaneously, so they could not have Rashford and Sancho on loan for the remainder of this season. Calciomercato now claims they are in contact, with Milan hoping they can convince Chelsea to include an option for them to sign Felix permanently for around £30 million.

Report: Joao Felix eyed by ‘very interested club’ as Rashford’s situation becomes clear
arts.sum: AC Milan are now reportedly very interested in Chelsea attacker Joao Felix. The Serie A giants are eyeing a move for the Portugal international, Sky Germany has suggested. Felix had moved to Chelsea just over the summer from Atletico Madrid.
